;---------------------------Estados usados Siempre------------------------------

; --- New Statedef -2 Content ---


;==================================================================================
;======| RELACIONADO À AI - AI RELATED |===========================================
;==================================================================================

; Within StateDef -2, none of your own AI-related code should be placed
; above these next two controllers.

[State -2, StopAI]
type = Null;VarSet
triggerall = (var(59) > 0)
trigger1 = (RoundState != 2)
trigger2 = !Alive
var(59) = -2
IgnoreHitPause = 1

; This controller is optional.  It allows you treat the AI flag as a boolean
; value rather than an integer value, letting you trigger your AI directives
; with "var(0)" instead of "var(59)>0", and letting you make moves usable only
; by humans by using "!var(0)" instead of "var(59)<1", thus slightly improving
; the size and efficiency of your code.
; Another benefit is that it makes it much easier for users to disable your AI,
; if they so choose.
[State -2, Simplifier]
type = Null;VarSet
trigger1 = (var(59) = 1)
trigger2 = (var(0):=0)
var(0) = 1	; Another option is to replace 1 with something like MatchNo, if
		; you want to design your AI to have varying levels of difficulty.
IgnoreHitPause = 1



[State -2, Universal Melee Homing (General Movement)]
type = Null;PosAdd
; Trigger: Only home if we are attacking (A), haven't hit anything yet, 
; and the enemy is not currently in a "hit" or "liedown" state (optional but safer).
triggerall = !IsHelper
triggerall = MoveType = A
triggerall = MoveContact = 0
triggerall = StateType != L ; Don't home if you are lying down
; The Core "Surefire" Trigger: Only move if the enemy is in front of us
trigger1 = ((EnemyNear, Pos X) - (Pos X)) * Facing > 0
; Distance Check: Only home if X dist > 20 OR Y dist > 10 (prevents jittering)
trigger1 = (P2BodyDist X > 20) ;|| (Abs(EnemyNear, Pos Y + (EnemyNear, Const(size.mid.pos.y)) - Pos Y) > 10)

; --- SITUATIONAL FILTERS ---
triggerall = !IsHelper                         ; Don't apply to projectiles/helpers
triggerall = Alive                             ; Don't home if you are dead
triggerall = MoveType = A                      ; Only home during an Attack phase
triggerall = MoveContact = 0                   ; Stop homing once the hit connects
triggerall = StateType != L                    ; Don't home if you are knocked down
triggerall = (EnemyNear, Alive)                ; Don't home toward a corpse
triggerall = (EnemyNear, MoveType != H)        ; Optional: Stop homing if enemy is already in hitstun
triggerall = (P2Dist X != [0, 5])              ; Prevents "shaking" when perfectly overlapping

; Only home if the enemy's X velocity (adjusted for facing) is NOT moving toward you quickly.
; This stops homing if the enemy is being pulled/thrown toward your position.
triggerall = (EnemyNear, Vel X) >= -2

; X-Axis Logic: Smoothly closes the gap to 25px away
x = ((((EnemyNear, Pos X) - (Pos X)) * Facing) - 25) / 4.0

; Y-Axis Logic: Aim for the enemy's mid-point (waist/chest)
;y = (EnemyNear, Pos Y + (EnemyNear, Const(size.mid.pos.y)) - Pos Y) / 4.0

; Scaling: Set a cap so the character doesn't "teleport" instantly
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, Universal Melee Homing (Ground Movement)]
type = Null;PosAdd
; Trigger: Only home if we are attacking (A), haven't hit anything yet, 
; and the enemy is not currently in a "hit" or "liedown" state (optional but safer).
triggerall = StateType !=A
triggerall = !IsHelper
triggerall = MoveType = A
triggerall = MoveContact = 0
triggerall = StateType != L ; Don't home if you are lying down
; The Core "Surefire" Trigger: Only move if the enemy is in front of us
trigger1 = ((EnemyNear, Pos X) - (Pos X)) * Facing > 0
; Distance Check: Only home if X dist > 20 OR Y dist > 10 (prevents jittering)
trigger1 = (P2BodyDist X > 20) ;|| (Abs(EnemyNear, Pos Y + (EnemyNear, Const(size.mid.pos.y)) - Pos Y) > 10)

; --- SITUATIONAL FILTERS ---
triggerall = !IsHelper                         ; Don't apply to projectiles/helpers
triggerall = Alive                             ; Don't home if you are dead
triggerall = MoveType = A                      ; Only home during an Attack phase
triggerall = MoveContact = 0                   ; Stop homing once the hit connects
triggerall = StateType != L                    ; Don't home if you are knocked down
triggerall = (EnemyNear, Alive)                ; Don't home toward a corpse
triggerall = (EnemyNear, MoveType != H)        ; Optional: Stop homing if enemy is already in hitstun
triggerall = (P2Dist X != [0, 5])              ; Prevents "shaking" when perfectly overlapping

; Only home if the enemy's X velocity (adjusted for facing) is NOT moving toward you quickly.
; This stops homing if the enemy is being pulled/thrown toward your position.
triggerall = (EnemyNear, Vel X) >= -2

; X-Axis Logic: Smoothly closes the gap to 25px away
x = ((((EnemyNear, Pos X) - (Pos X)) * Facing) - 25) / 4.0

; Y-Axis Logic: Aim for the enemy's mid-point (waist/chest)
;y = (EnemyNear, Pos Y + (EnemyNear, Const(size.mid.pos.y)) - Pos Y) / 4.0

; Scaling: Set a cap so the character doesn't "teleport" instantly
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, Universal Melee Homing (Air Movement)]
type = Null;PosAdd
; Trigger: Only home if we are attacking (A), haven't hit anything yet, 
; and the enemy is not currently in a "hit" or "liedown" state (optional but safer).
triggerall = StateType = A
triggerall = !IsHelper
triggerall = MoveType = A
triggerall = MoveContact = 0
triggerall = StateType != L ; Don't home if you are lying down
; The Core "Surefire" Trigger: Only move if the enemy is in front of us
trigger1 = ((EnemyNear, Pos X) - (Pos X)) * Facing > 0
; Distance Check: Only home if X dist > 20 OR Y dist > 10 (prevents jittering)
trigger1 = (P2BodyDist X > 20) ;|| (Abs(EnemyNear, Pos Y + (EnemyNear, Const(size.mid.pos.y)) - Pos Y) > 10)

; --- SITUATIONAL FILTERS ---
triggerall = !IsHelper                         ; Don't apply to projectiles/helpers
triggerall = Alive                             ; Don't home if you are dead
triggerall = MoveType = A                      ; Only home during an Attack phase
triggerall = MoveContact = 0                   ; Stop homing once the hit connects
triggerall = StateType != L                    ; Don't home if you are knocked down

triggerall = (EnemyNear, MoveType != H)        ; Optional: Stop homing if enemy is already in hitstun
triggerall = (P2Dist X != [0, 5])              ; Prevents "shaking" when perfectly overlapping

; Only home if the enemy's X velocity (adjusted for facing) is NOT moving toward you quickly.
; This stops homing if the enemy is being pulled/thrown toward your position.
triggerall = (EnemyNear, Vel X) >= -2

; X-Axis Logic: Smoothly closes the gap to 25px away
x = ((((EnemyNear, Pos X) - (Pos X)) * Facing) - 25) / 4.0

; Y-Axis Logic: Aim for the enemy's mid-point (waist/chest)
y = (EnemyNear, Pos Y + (EnemyNear, Const(size.mid.pos.y)) - Pos Y) / 4.0

; Scaling: Set a cap so the character doesn't "teleport" instantly
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, Universal Melee Homing (Helper Movement)]

; and the enemy is not currently in a "hit" or "liedown" state (optional but safer).

; --- SITUATIONAL FILTERS ---

; This stops homing if the enemy is being pulled/thrown toward your position.

[State 0, VelSet]

trigger1 = 1

trigger3 = 1

;Critical Hit and Jackpot System

;---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; UNIVERSAL CRITICAL HIT SYSTEM (VAR-FREE)
;---------------------------------------------------------------------------
[State -2, Critical Hit Logic]
type = Null;TargetLifeAdd
triggerall = RoundState = 2              ; Only during the fight
triggerall = MoveHit = 1                 ; Trigger exactly when the hit connects
;triggerall = !IsHelper                   ; Optional: Prevent helpers from causing crits (delete if you want helpers to crit)
trigger1 = Random <= 100                 ; 10% Chance (100 out of 1000)
value = -50                              ; Extra Damage (Negative number subtracts life)
kill = 1                                 ; Can this kill? 1=Yes, 0=No
absolute = 1                             ; Ignore defense scaling? 1=True Damage

[State -2, Critical Hit Visual (Screen Flash)]
type = Null;EnvColor
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100                 ; Must match the chance in the block above
value = 255,255,255                      ; Color (RGB) - Currently White
time = 2                                 ; Duration of flash (1-2 ticks is best)
under = 1                                ; Draw under characters? (0=No, 1=Yes)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, Critical Hit Sound Effect]
type = Null;PlaySnd
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100                 ; Must match the chance in the block above
value = F5,4                             ; Plays Common Sound 5,4 (Usually a heavy hit sound)
channel = 0                              ; Channel 0 to interrupt voice/other sounds
ignorehitpause = 1

; Optional: Pause the game briefly for impact (Zoom-in effect feel)
[State -2, Critical Hit Pause]
type = Null;Pause
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100                 ; Must match the chance in the block above
time = 2                                 ; Freeze time (keep it low, 2-4 ticks)
movetime = 0

; Optional: Pause the game briefly for impact (Zoom-in effect feel)
[State -2, Critical Hit Zoom]
type = Null;Zoom
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100                 ; Must match the chance in the block above
time = 2                                 ; Freeze time (keep it low, 2-4 ticks)
movetime = 0

;---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; VAR-FREE JACKPOT CRIT SYSTEM
;---------------------------------------------------------------------------
[State -2, Jackpot Damage Logic]
type = Null;TargetLifeAdd
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1             ; Only triggers on the frame contact is made
;triggerall = !IsHelper               ; Optional: Don't let helpers trigger it
; -------------------------------------------------------------------
; ENTRY GATE: 10% chance (Random <= 100) to crit at all. 
; If this fails, normal damage happens and this controller is ignored.
trigger1 = Random <= 100
; -------------------------------------------------------------------
; THE JACKPOT LOGIC (Nested Cond)
; Structure: cond(IsUltraRare?, Damage, cond(IsRare?, Damage, cond(IsUncommon?, Damage, BaseDamage)))
;
; Tier 1 (GOD):   0.5% chance (Random < 5)   -> 9999 Damage (Instant Kill)
; Tier 2 (S-Rank): 5% chance  (Random < 50)  -> 400 Damage
; Tier 3 (A-Rank): 20% chance (Random < 200) -> 150 Damage
; Tier 4 (Common): Remaining chance          -> 50 Damage
; -------------------------------------------------------------------
value = -1 * floor(cond(Random < 5, 9999, cond(Random < 50, 400, cond(Random < 200, 150, 50))))
kill = 1
absolute = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

; [Optional] Visual Flash to indicate a Jackpot occurred
[State -2, Jackpot Flash]
type = Null;EnvColor
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100             ; Must match the Entry Gate above
value = 255,255,0                    ; Flash Gold/Yellow for money effect
time = 2
under = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

; [Optional] Sound Effect
[State -2, Jackpot Sound]
type = Null;PlaySnd
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100             ; Must match the Entry Gate above
value = F5,4
ignorehitpause = 1

; Optional: Pause the game briefly for impact (Zoom-in effect feel)
[State -2, Critical Hit Pause]
type = Null;Pause
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100                 ; Must match the chance in the block above
time = 2                                 ; Freeze time (keep it low, 2-4 ticks)
movetime = 0

; Optional: Pause the game briefly for impact (Zoom-in effect feel)
[State -2, Critical Hit Zoom]
type = Null;Zoom
triggerall = RoundState = 2
triggerall = MoveHit = 1
trigger1 = Random <= 100                 ; Must match the chance in the block above
time = 2                                 ; Freeze time (keep it low, 2-4 ticks)
movetime = 0

; Set Bit 12 (4096) to TRUE, leave other bits alone
v = 50
value = var(50) | 4096

;ignorehitpause = 1



; Dynamic Cornerpush (Single-Pulse Logic)
[State -3, Omni-Adaptive Cornerpush]
type = Null;PosAdd
triggerall = numtarget
triggerall = !hitpausetime
; Only trigger on the VERY FIRST frame the target is hit
triggerall = target, time = 0
triggerall = target, gethitvar(hitshaketime) > 0
triggerall = target,statetype != A && !(target,hitfall)
; Only trigger if target is actually against a corner
trigger1 = (target,frontedgebodydist <= 0) && (target,gethitvar(xvel) > 0)
trigger2 = (target,backedgebodydist <= 0) && (target,gethitvar(xvel) < 0)
; Math: Instant pushback based on the move's intended power
x = (target,facing) * (target,gethitvar(xvel) * 0.8)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -3, Edge Guard (Relative Correction)]
type = Null;PosAdd
triggerall = numtarget
trigger1 = frontedgebodydist < 0
x = -frontedgebodydist
ignorehitpause = 1

;===========================================================================
; UNIVERSAL GROUND-LOGIC & OTG SYSTEM (VAR-FREE & ADAPTIVE)
;===========================================================================

; [PART 1: ENEMY OTG LOCK]
; Forces the opponent to stay on the ground as long as you are attacking.
[State -2, Target: OTG Ground Lock]
type = Null;TargetState
triggerall = numtarget && !ishelper
; Logic: Only target enemies who are already lying down
triggerall = target, statetype = L ;&& target, anim = 5120
; Adaptability: Only lock them if you are actively attacking and nearby
trigger1 = movetype = A && p2dist x < 50
; Math: Force them to maintain their current state number
value = target, stateno
ignorehitpause = 1

; [PART 2: ADAPTIVE RELEASE]
; Dynamically releases the opponent when the combo ends or distance is too great.
[State -2, Target: Adaptive Release]
type = Null;TargetState
triggerall = numtarget && !ishelper
triggerall = target, stateno = 5120 ; Only run if they are in the lock-state
; Logic: Release if P1 stops attacking, P1 is hit, or P1 moves away
trigger1 = movetype != A || p2dist x > 80 || movehit = 0
value = 5120 ; Standard reset to 5120 allows MUGEN's "Get Up" timer to start
ctrl = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, Omni Vacuum/Bind]
type = Null;TargetBind
triggerall = movehit
triggerall = !hitpausetime
; Only bind if the move is intended to be a "close-range" strike (Adjust 50 to preference)
trigger1 = target,gethitvar(xvel) < 2 
; Keep them exactly at their current distance to prevent "falling out" of combos
pos = (target, pos x - pos x) * facing, (target, pos y - pos y)
time = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

; Intelligent Stun Decay (Uses combo count math instead of timers)
[State -2, Dynamic Hitstun Modifier]
type = Null;TargetState
triggerall = numtarget
triggerall = p2movetype = H
; If combo is long (approx > 15 hits), force recovery
trigger1 = target,gethitvar(hitcount) > 15 
trigger1 = target,gethitvar(hitshaketime) = 0
value = 5050 ; Transition to air recovery state
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2, Scaled Damage/Stun]
type = Null;HitAdd
trigger1 = 1
; This uses the internal engine scaling rather than fvar(11)
value = ifelse(target,gethitvar(hitcount) > 10, 0.5, 1.0)

[State -2, Intelligent Hitstun Decay]
type = Null;TargetLifeAdd
triggerall = numtarget && p2movetype = H
trigger1 = target,gethitvar(hitcount) > 10
; Dynamically reduce damage as combo gets longer (Damage * 0.9^hitcount)
value = -floor(target,gethitvar(damage) * (0.9 ** target,gethitvar(hitcount)))
ID = target,ID

;==================================================
;--- CUSTOM WARUSAKI3 STYLE AI ACTIVATION  ---
;==================================================

        
; If you want to use the Guard mode, Dummy mode, Distance, or Button jam dummy control
; options in Training mode without activating the dummy's AI while working on your
; character, then all you need to do is temporarily disable this controller.
; Or, if you want to permanently disable this controller in Training mode,
; then you could use the Training mode detection code available on my site
; ( http://www.shinmugen.net/winane/ ), and then just add a "(var(59)&63)>30"
; triggerall to this controller.
[State -3, AI Helper]
type = Helper
trigger1 = AILevel > 0
triggerall = !IsHelper
triggerall = !numhelper(974122)
triggerall = alive && roundstate=2
trigger1 = !NumPartner
trigger2 = !(Partner,SelfAnimExist(9999))
HelperType = normal
name = "AI Helper Activator"
ID = 974122
pos = 9999999,99999
StateNo = 974122
KeyCtrl = 1
PauseMoveTime = 999999999
SuperMoveTime = 999999999 

; It is very important that this controller NOT be moved to State -2, as putting
; it there would defeat the entire purpose of the controller, allowing the
; helper method or the XOR method to erroneously set the AI variable.
; And within State -3, don't put any ChangeState controllers before this
; controller, lest you unnecessarily delay your character's AI activation.
[State -3, GameTimeVar]
type = Null;VarSet
trigger1 = 1
var(57) = GameTime
IgnoreHitPause = 1

;AIhelper
[Statedef 3300011]
;anim = 20218;9999;20218;9999;20218
Ctrl = 0
; [Listen & Buffer]
; We consolidate the 4 triggers into a single check.
; If any overflow helper has a command, we grab it into var(58).
; Then, we send that command to our parent (the main character) command
; We use Bit 10 (1024) to ensure the AI "Gate" is open before listening.

;==================================================
;--- AI OVERFLOW COMMAND BUS (CPU LOGIC) ---;==================================================
[State 3300011, AI Overflow Command Bus - Listen]
type = VarSet
triggerall = var(50) & 1024  ; <--- Only listen if AI Gate is open
triggerall = 1
trigger1 = NumHelper(998812344) && Helper(998812344),var(56) > 0 && (var(58) := Helper(998812344),var(56)) || 1
trigger2 = NumHelper(998812344+1) && Helper(998812344+1),var(56) > 0 && (var(58) := Helper(998812344+1),var(56)) || 1
trigger3 = NumHelper(998812344+2) && Helper(998812344+2),var(56) > 0 && (var(58) := Helper(998812344+2),var(56)) || 1
trigger4 = NumHelper(998812344+3) && Helper(998812344+3),var(56) > 0 && (var(58) := Helper(998812344+3),var(56)) || 1
v = 57 ; Use a temporary var to flag that a command has been received
value = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 3300011, AI Overflow Command Bus - Send]
type = ParentVarSet
trigger1 = var(57) = 1
trigger1 = Parent, var(58) != var(58)
; Only send if Parent is in a state where they can actually move (Ctrl)
; AND only if the parent's buffer is currently empty (0)
;trigger1 = (Parent, Ctrl) && (Parent, var(58) = 0)
v = 58 ; Set the main character's (our parent's) command buffer to 58
value = var(58)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 3300011, AI Overflow Command Bus - Reset]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = var(57) = 1
v = 58 ; Clear our internal buffer
value = 0
ignorehitpause = 1
[State 3300011, AI Overflow Command Bus - Reset Flag]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = var(57) = 1
v = 57 ; Reset the flag
value = 0
ignorehitpause = 1
; -- COMBO BREAKER & SPECIAL MODE LOGIC --
; Burst cooldown disabled by user.
[State , Special Mode Placeholder]
type = Null
; This is a placeholder for your character's special mode.
; To make the burst AI smarter, find the StateDef for your special mode
; and add a controller to set var(36) = 1 on activation and var(36) = 0 on deactivation.
trigger1 = 1

; -- STRATEGIC MODE CONTROLLERS --
[State 33000, Set Strategy]
type = VarSet
triggerall = 1
trigger1 = 1
v = 25 ; Using var(25) for strategy
; Default to Aggressive (1)
value = 1

[State 33000, Strategy: Defensive]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = Life > enemynear,Life
v = 25
value = 2

[State 33000, Strategy: Finisher]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = Power >= 1000 && enemynear,life < 250
v = 25
value = 3

; -- PRESSURE RESET LOGIC --
[State 33000, Detect Blocked Hit]
type = VarSet
; This triggers on the frame a move connects but is blocked
trigger1 = MoveContact && enemynear, movetype = H
; Set a cooldown timer for our pressure (e.g., 60 frames)
v = 26 ; Using var(26) for pressure cooldown
value = 60
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 33000, Pressure Cooldown]
type = VarAdd
trigger1 = var(26) > 0
v = 26
value = -1
ignorehitpause = 1

; -- MEATY OKIZEME LOGIC --
[State 33000, Detect Knockdown]
type = VarSet
; When P2 is knocked down, get their recovery time.
trigger1 = enemynear, statetype = L && var(27) <= 0
v = 27 ; Using var(27) for meaty timer
value = EnemyNear, GetHitVar(fall.recovertime)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 33000, Meaty Timer Countdown]
type = VarAdd
trigger1 = var(27) > 0
v = 27
value = -1
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 33000, Reset Meaty Timer]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = var(27) > 0 && enemynear, statetype != L
v = 27
value = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

; -- METER MANAGEMENT POLICY --
[State 33000, Set Meter Policy]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = 1
triggerall = 1
v = 28 ; 0=Spend, 1=Save for L2+, 2=Save for L3
value = 0 ; Default: Spend freely

[State 33000, Policy: Save Meter]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = Life > Enemynear,Life && Life > 600 && Power < 2000
v = 28
value = 1 ; Save up for a level 2

[State 33000, Policy: Finisher Mode]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = var(25) = 3 ; If in Finisher strategy mode
v = 28
value = 0 ; Spend everything

; -- WHIFF PUNISH LOGIC --
[State 33000, Detect Whiffed Attack]
type = VarSet
; If the enemy is in an attack state but we are not in hitstun, they might have whiffed.
trigger1 = EnemyNear,MoveType = A && MoveType != H
trigger1 = P2Dist X < 150 ; Only track whiffs at close-to-mid range
; Store the recovery time of their move. We approximate this with AnimTime.
; A more complex helper could learn exact recovery frames.
v = 29 ; Using var(29) for whiff punish window
value = EnemyNear,AnimTime
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 33000, Whiff Countdown]
type = VarAdd
trigger1 = var(29) < 0
v = 29
value = 1 ; Counts up towards 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 33000, Reset Whiff Tracker]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = var(29) >= 0
trigger2 = EnemyNear,MoveType != A
v = 29
value = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

;-------- Performance Fix: Interleave Logic --------
[State 32767, Tick Reduction]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = 1
v = 51 
value = (var(51) + 1) % 2

;-------- Artificial Variable Bridge (The "Gate") --------
; We use Bit 10 (1024) to tell the Parent the AI Helper is active.
[State 32767, AI Bridge]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = 1
v = 50
value = (var(50) - (var(50) & 1024)) | 1024
ignorehitpause = 1

;======== BIND & POWER RECORD ========
[State 32767, Bind]
type = PosSet
trigger1 = var(51) = 0
x = Parent, Pos x
y = Parent, Pos y - 100
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 32767, Power Record]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = 1
v = 43
value = Enemynear, Power

;======== BITWISE DETECTION (CENSOR) ========

; Detect: Enemy Attacking (Bit 1)
[State 32767, Enemy Attack Bit]
type = VarSet
triggerall = var(51) = 0
trigger1 = P2MoveType = A
v = 50
value = var(50) | 1
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 32767, Clear Attack Bit]
type = VarSet
triggerall = var(51) = 0
trigger1 = P2MoveType != A
v = 50
value = var(50) - (var(50) & 1)
ignorehitpause = 1

; Detect: Enemy Charging (Bit 2)
[State 32767, Charge Bit]
type = VarSet
triggerall = var(51) = 0
trigger1 = Enemynear, Power > var(43) && P2MoveType = I
v = 50
value = var(50) | 2
ignorehitpause = 1

;======== HELPER ID SCANNER (The Guessing Logic) ========
; I changed var(59) to var(52) here to avoid AI Level clashing.

[State 32769, Init]
type = varset
trigger1 = !time
var(21) = Enemynear,NumHelper
ignoreHitPause = 1

[State 32769, Sync LowID]
type = varset
trigger1 = !time
var(31) = Parent,var(31)
ignoreHitPause = 1

[State 32769, Guess High ID]
type = varset
trigger1 = time
trigger1 = var(21) != Enemynear,NumHelper
trigger1 = var(21):= Enemynear,NumHelper
trigger1 = var(52):= 1 ; <-- Used 52 instead of 59
var(22) = IFElse(var(22),var(22),ID) + 3
ignoreHitPause = 1

[State 32769, Range Start]
type = varset
trigger1 = var(22) && var(52) = 1
var(23) = var(22)
ignoreHitPause = 1

;[State 32769, Scanning Bit (Bit 3 / Value 4)]
; If the scanner finds a projectile/helper, we set Bit 3 in our Artificial Var
[State 32769, Detect Projectile Helper]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = var(23)
trigger1 = PlayerIDExist(var(23))
trigger1 = PlayerID(var(23)),HitDefAttr = SCA,AA,AT,AP
trigger1 = PlayerID(var(23)),vel x > 0
v = 50
value = var(50) | 4 ; Set Bit 3
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 32769, Range Decrease]
type = varset
trigger1 = var(23) >= var(31) && var(23) <= var(22)
trigger1 = var(22) && var(52) >= 1
trigger1 = var(52):= var(52) + 1
var(23) = var(23) - 1
ignoreHitPause = 1

;======== REPORT TO PARENT ========
[State 32767, Sync to Parent]
type = ParentVarSet
trigger1 = Parent, var(50) != var(50)
v = 50
value = var(50)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 32769, Debug]
type = displaytoclipboard
trigger1 = 1
text = "AI_Gate=%d | EHelper=%d | ScanID=%d | BitMask=%d"
params = (var(50) & 1024), var(21), var(23), var(50)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 32769, Safe Exit]
type = DestroySelf
trigger1 = roundstate > 2

; --- Injected User Code: Simul Opponent Tracking ---
; This logic now prioritizes the 1st nearest enemy (the second closest) if one exists.
; It will fall back to the 0-th nearest (closest) enemy if the 1st is defeated or in a 1v1 fight.

[State 3300011, Target 1st Nearest Enemy]
Type = VarSet ;Null;Varset ;if problematic
triggerall = RoundState = 2
trigger1 = NumEnemy > 1           ; Checks if there is more than one enemy.
trigger1 = EnemyNear(1), Life > 0 ; Checks if the 1st nearest enemy is alive.
var(36) = 1                       ; Sets the target to the 1st nearest enemy.
IgnoreHitPause = 1

[State 3300011, Fallback to 0-th Nearest Enemy]
Type = VarSet ;Null;Varset ;if problematic
triggerall = RoundState = 2
; This trigger activates if the first state controller's conditions are not met.
trigger1 = NumEnemy = 1           ; Always target the closest if there's only one enemy.
trigger2 = NumEnemy > 1           ; Or, if there are multiple enemies...
trigger2 = EnemyNear(1), Life <= 0; ...but the 1st nearest is defeated.
var(36) = 0                       ; Sets the target to the 0-th nearest (closest) enemy.
IgnoreHitPause = 1

; --- LOGIC PATH 1: The "Non-Standard" State Definition ---
; This is the most important fix. We check if you are:
; 1. In a non-common state ( > 600 )
; 2. NOT in a hit state ( 5000 range )
; 3. NOT in a guard state ( 120-159 )

trigger1 = StateNo != [120, 159] ; Correct way to exclude Guarding

[State 2200011, Stealth State & Power Tracker]
type = VarSet
triggerall = RoundState = 2 && Alive
; --- STEP 1: Detect Meter Burn (Power < Memory) ---
; We extract the saved power from bits 11+ by shifting/dividing.
; If current Power/10 < saved value, Bit 10 (1024) is flipped ON.
trigger1 = (Power/10) < ((var(50) & 8386560) / 2048)
trigger1 = (var(50) := var(50) | 1024) || 1

; --- STEP 2: Detect Custom States (StateNo/Anim) ---
; If outside standard ranges, flip Bit 10 (1024) ON.

; --- STEP 3: Detect Active Specials/Hypers ---

trigger3 = (var(50) := var(50) | 1024) || 1

; --- STEP 4: MEMORY UPDATE (The Warusaki Bridge) ---
; This is the "Stealth VarSet". It wipes the old power bits and 
; saves the current Power/10 into bits 11-22 for the next frame.
; Logic: (Clear Bits 11+) | (New Power << 11)
trigger4 = (var(50) := (var(50) & 2047) | ((Power/10) * 2048)) || 1
v = 50
value = var(50)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State -2,消失]
type=DestroySelf

trigger1=roundstate!=[1,2]
[State 33333]
type = assertspecial
trigger1 = 1
flag = invisible
[State 33333]

[State 33333,間違いで本体が来たら立ちへ移行]

;Ignore This or Delete It
; AI Projectile & Entity Scanner Helper (from Template)
;[Statedef 55555]
;type=A
;movetype=I
;physics=N
;ctrl=0

;velset=0,0

;[State 55555, Main Scanner Logic]

;trigger1 = 1 ; Placeholder for complex scanner logic. Full logic would be embedded.

;[State 55555, Destroy]
;type=DestroySelf
;trigger1=time>10

; ===========================================================================
; --- OMNI-AI LOGIC SYSTEM (UPGRADED & ROBUST) ---
; Main Brain Module
; Helper ID: 4444
; ===========================================================================

[Statedef 4444]
Type = A
Ctrl = 0
anim = 20218;9999;20218;9999;20218
Movetype = I
Physics = N
VelSet = 0,0

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; [CORE INTEGRITY]
; Self-correction and invisibility
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[State 4444, SelfState]
type = SelfState
trigger1 = !IsHelper
value = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Invisible]
type = AssertSpecial
trigger1 = 1
flag = invisible
flag2 = noshadow
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Invuln]
type = NotHitBy
trigger1 = 1
value = SCA
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Position Bind]
type = BindToRoot
trigger1 = 1
time = 1
facing = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; [ADAPTIVE AI CONFIGURATION]
; Dynamic Difficulty and Randomization
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[State 4444, Sync AI Level]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = 1
var(59) = AILevel ; Syncs internal AI level with Root's AI level
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, RNG Generator]
type = VarRandom
trigger1 = 1
v = 56
range = 0, 1000
ignorehitpause = 1

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; [ADVANCED PHYSICS TRACKING]
; Calculates relative distance, velocity, and predicted positions.
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

; --- X Axis Physics (Enhanced) ---

; --- OMNI-ADAPTIVE PHYSICS TRACKER ---

[State 4444, Vel X (Closing Speed)]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; Calculates exact speed at which P1 and P2 are narrowing/widening the gap
fvar(5) = (EnemyNear,Vel X * ifelse(EnemyNear,Facing = Facing, -1, 1))
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, RelVel X (Closing Speed)]
type = Null;VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; Calculates exact speed at which P1 and P2 are narrowing/widening the gap
fvar(5) = (EnemyNear,Vel X * ifelse(EnemyNear,Facing = Facing, -1, 1)) - (Root,Vel X)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Vel Y (Vertical Convergence)]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
fvar(15) = EnemyNear,Vel Y
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, RelVel Y (Vertical Convergence)]
type = Null;VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
fvar(15) = EnemyNear,Vel Y - Root,Vel Y
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, X-Accel (Dampened)]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; We use ifelse to prevent "Accel Spikes" during state changes
fvar(4) = ifelse(Root,PrevStateNo != Root,StateNo, 0, fvar(5) - fvar(6))
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Enemy Gravity Capture]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; Capture enemy's internal gravity for the Ultimate Y-Axis prediction
fvar(17) = EnemyNear, const(movement.yaccel)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Store Previous Vel]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
fvar(6) = fvar(5) ; X
ignorehitpause = 1

; --- Y Axis Physics (Enhanced) ---

[State 4444, Store Previous Vel]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
fvar(16) = fvar(15) ; Y
ignorehitpause = 1

; --- Y-Axis Physics Evolution ---
[State 4444, Y-Accel Tracking (Gravity Delta)]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; We compare current RelVelY against the previous frame's RelVelY
; This detects if the opponent is in a custom gravity state or being launched
fvar(14) = fvar(15) - fvar(16)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Store Previous Y-Vel]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
fvar(16) = fvar(15)
ignorehitpause = 1

; --- Distance Amalgamation (Physics Corrected) ---
[State 4444, Absolute Distance X]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; Using P2BodyDist instead of Pos calculation ensures the AI accounts for
; character width (collision boxes) rather than just the center point.
fvar(10) = P2BodyDist X
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Absolute Distance Y]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; Ensures Y distance is relative to the floor, not just the root
fvar(11) = P2BodyDist Y
ignorehitpause = 1

; --- Wall Proximity (The "Corner-Lock" Evolution) ---
[State 4444, Root Front Edge Dist]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = 1
; Using FrontEdgeDist is safer than ScreenPos math because it automatically
; accounts for GameWidth and Stage Camera Zoom.
fvar(12) = FrontEdgeDist
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Enemy Front Edge Dist]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; This tells the AI if the opponent is backed against a wall.
; Crucial for the Python generator to switch to "Corner Combo" logic.
fvar(13) = EnemyNear, FrontEdgeDist
ignorehitpause = 1

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; [OMNI-COMBAT LOGIC]
; State recognition and advantage calculation
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[State 4444, Facing Mismatch]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
var(44) = -(Root,Facing) * (EnemyNear,Facing)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Enemy State Config]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = NumEnemy
; 1 = Stand, 2 = Crouch, 3 = Air, 4 = LieDown
var(45) = IfElse(EnemyNear,StateType=S, 1, IfElse(EnemyNear,StateType=C, 2, IfElse(EnemyNear,StateType=A, 3, 4)))
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Enemy Recovery Type]
type = VarSet
triggerall = NumEnemy
trigger1 = 1
; Returns friction value to predict slide distance
fvar(9) = IfElse(EnemyNear,StateType=C, EnemyNear,Const(movement.crouch.friction), EnemyNear,Const(movement.stand.friction))
ignorehitpause = 1

; ===========================================================================
; AI LOGIC HELPER: STATE MONITORING (BITWISE GATED)
; ===========================================================================

[State 4444, Reset Attack State]
type = VarSet
; Logic: var(50) = var(50) - (is bit 1024 active?) 
; This clears ONLY the 1024 bit without affecting other bits/values.
trigger1 = Root, MoveType != A
v = 50
value = var(50) - (var(50) & 1024)
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Detect Active Frames]
type = VarSet
; Logic: var(50) = var(50) | 1024
; Sets Bit 1024 to 'True' while preserving all other data in var(50).
trigger1 = Root, MoveType = A
v = 50
value = var(50) | 1024
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Detect Recovery]
type = VarSet
; Logic: Clears the 1024 bit when in Idle/Recovery (MoveType I)
trigger1 = Root, MoveType = I
v = 50
value = var(50) - (var(50) & 1024)
ignorehitpause = 1

; --- Frame Advantage / Danger Detection ---

[State 4444, Reset Attack State]
type = Null;VarSet
trigger1 = Root,MoveType != A
var(50) = 0 ; Safe
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Detect Active Frames]
type = Null;VarSet
trigger1 = Root,MoveType = A
var(50) = 1 ; Attacking
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Detect Recovery]
type = Null;VarSet
trigger1 = Root,MoveType = I
var(50) = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Enemy Knockdown Timer]
type = VarSet
triggerall = NumEnemy
trigger1 = enemynear, statetype = L
trigger1 = EnemyNear,StateNo = 5120 ; Getting up
var(46) = (EnemyNear,AnimTime) ; Negative value indicating time until stand up
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Enemy Attack Counter]
type = VarAdd
triggerall = NumEnemy
trigger1 = EnemyNear,MoveType = A
trigger1 = EnemyNear,HitDefAttr = SCA, NA, SA, HA
trigger1 = var(47) < 30 ; Cap to prevent overflow
var(47) = 1
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Reset Attack Counter]
type = VarSet
triggerall = NumEnemy
trigger1 = EnemyNear,MoveType != A
var(47) = 0
ignorehitpause = 1

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; [CONTROL & MODE LOGIC]
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[State 4444, Root Mode Tracker]
type = VarSet
trigger1 = 1
var(55) = (Root,Var(2) / 1000 % 10) ; Extract specific mode digit from common variable
ignorehitpause = 1

[State 4444, Control Advantage]
type = VarSet
triggerall = NumEnemy
trigger1 = 1
; 1 = We have advantage, -1 = Enemy has advantage
var(0) = IfElse(Root,Ctrl && !EnemyNear,Ctrl, 1, IfElse(!Root,Ctrl && EnemyNear,Ctrl, -1, 0))
ignorehitpause = 1

; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
; Edge/Screen Control Projectile Helpers (Spawned by Main Logic Helper)
; ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
